Fields.Name: Behavior Variation ID
Fields.Description: Variation ID used when calculating the action ID.

Fields.Name: Name ID
Fields.Description: NPC Name Message Parameter ID

Fields.Name: Turn Velocity
Fields.Description: Rotational speed [degrees / second] that can turn in 1 second.

Fields.Name: Capsule Height
Fields.Description: The height of the capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Capsule Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of capsule per character.

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: weight.

Fields.Name: Display Position - Height Offset
Fields.Description: Offset of the model display position in the Y (height) direction. It can be floated from the hit position.

Fields.Name: Base HP
Fields.Description: Death grace.

Fields.Name: Base FP
Fields.Description: Magic usage.

Fields.Name: Base Souls
Fields.Description: The amount of soul that a character can get at the time of death.

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID 1
Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Description: Itemlot ID to be dropped upon death

Fields.Name: Item Lot ID (Humanity)
Fields.Description: (Most Likely not used in ds3)

Fields.Name: SpEffect ID 0
Fields.Description: Resident special effect 0

Fields.Description: Resident special effect 1

Fields.Description: Special effect ID for lap bonus

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Physical
Fields.Description: Set the damage cut rate when guarding for each attack

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Magic
Fields.Description: If it is not a guard attack, enter 0

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Fire
Fields.Description: How much to cut the fire attack?

Fields.Name: Guard Absorption: Lightning
Fields.Description: How much to cut the electric shock attack?

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset [1]
Fields.Description: All animations will be played with IDs shifted by this number. If not, the original anime ID is referenced.

Fields.Name: Move Animation ID
Fields.Description: Moving animation parameter reference ID

Fields.Name: Special Move Animation ID [1]
Fields.Description: Special movement animation parameter reference ID

Fields.Name: Special Move Animation ID [2]
Fields.Description: Special movement animation parameter reference ID

Fields.Name: Network Warp Display
Fields.Description: Distance to warp instead of complementary movement in network synchronization. Faster people (ex dragons) need to be longer.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - R1
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - L1
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - R2
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Cross
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Triangle
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Left D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Debug Action - Up D-Pad
Fields.Description: Register the ID from the action parameter tool and specify the action.

Fields.Name: Anim ID Offset [2]
Fields.Description: All animations will be played with IDs shifted by this number. If not, the animation ID of the animation ID offset 1 is referred to.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: Total amount of stamina.

Fields.Name: Resist: Poison
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting poisonous

Fields.Name: Resist: Toxic
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting sick

Fields.Name: Resist: Bleed
Fields.Description: Difficulty in getting bleeding abnormalities

Fields.Name: Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: Difficulty in dealing with abnormal curse conditions

Fields.Name: Ghost Model ID
Fields.Description: Replacement model when wandering ghost, texture ID

Fields.Name: Override Resource Chr ID
Fields.Description: Replace resource ID during normal operation (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Guard Angle
Fields.Description: Defense range angle when guarding weapons. Pending

Fields.Name: Override Texture Chr ID
Fields.Description: Normal replacement texture character ID (do not use it unnecessarily)

Fields.Name: Drop Type
Fields.Description: Display method when dropping an item (corpse emission or item display)

Fields.Name: Team Type
Fields.Description: Determines enemy\ally\aggro\damage status in relation to other teams.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Distance
Fields.Description: Lock-on distance [m]

Fields.Name: Material SE - Damaged
Fields.Description: Sound played by material when damaged.

Fields.Name: Material SFX - Damaged
Fields.Description: SFX played by material when damaged.

Fields.Name: Material SE - Damaged in Weak Spot
Fields.Description: Sound played by material when damaged in weak spot.

Fields.Name: Material SFX - Damaged in Weak Spot
Fields.Description: SFX played by material when damaged in weak spot.

Fields.Name: Parts Damage Type
Fields.Description:
Determines if weak parts (such as the head) will be affected by all attacks or just arrow attacks.
Headshot animation will be used for weak part attacks if it exists.

Fields.Name: Guard Level
Fields.Description: Determines guard hit anim used depending on incoming damageLevel.

Fields.Name: Parry Attack
Fields.Description: If this is greater than defender's Parry Defense, the attack cannot be parried.

Fields.Name: Parry Defense
Fields.Description: If this is equal to or greater than attacker's Parry Attack, the attack can be parried.

Fields.Name: SFX Size
Fields.Description: Determines which version of a SpEffect's VFX to use (i.e. bigger poison clouds on bigger enemies).

Fields.Name: Hit Stop Type
Fields.Description: Setting whether to perform hit stop processing

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Top
Fields.Description: Upper side of the ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Ladder End Check Offset Bottom
Fields.Description: Lower side of ladder end judgment offset

Fields.Name: Use Ragdoll Camera Hit
Fields.Description: Does the camera hit the enemy ragdoll? (Valid only when hitting the player)

Fields.Name: Disable Cloth Rigid Hit
Fields.Description: If you want to prevent the cross rigid from hitting you

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type A (Demon)
Fields.Description: Special attack A? Special attack A damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Is Ghost
Fields.Description: The opponent's attack will be able to slip through. The attack hits only when the anti-spirit weapon of the weapon para is attacked with the weapon of . Be careful not to confuse it with a wandering ghost

Fields.Name: No Damage Motion
Fields.Description: Do you not play the damage motion when the damage is 0?

Fields.Name: Is Undulating
Fields.Description: Do you match the back and forth rotation of the character with the undulations of the ground? Cannot be used for flying characters

Fields.Name: Is Wandering Ghost
Fields.Description: Will it be a wandering ghost when the player is a client?

Fields.Name: Is Enable Neck Turn
Fields.Description: Do you want to enable the swing set in Param Weaver?

Fields.Name: Disable Respawn upon Rest
Fields.Description: Do you ban respawn?

Fields.Name: Play Movement Anim until Over
Fields.Description: Do you want to play the moving animation until the animation is over? (Like a mayfly dragon.)

Fields.Name: Reduce Processing Load during Crowds
Fields.Description: Do you want to reduce the processing load during crowds? For babies (preferably phalanx)

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type B (Undead)
Fields.Description: Special attack B? Special attack B damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type C (Hollow)
Fields.Description: Special attack C? Special attack C damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Enemy Type: Type D (Abyssal)
Fields.Description: Special attack D? Special attack D damage multiplier will be included in the calculation

Fields.Name: Vow Type
Fields.Description:
Determines Vow ID depending on permutation of flags.
ABC
000 - Vow 0
100 - Vow 1
010 - Vow 2
110 - Vow 3
001 - Vow 4
101 - Vow 5
011 - Vow 6
111 - Vow 7

Fields.Name: Disable Init Dead
Fields.Description: If you do not make an initial death, TRUE, even if you kill and save it, the corpse will not be reproduced.

Fields.Name: Is Boss Soul Drop
Fields.Description: Do you get a boss in soul?
